name: John Walker
description:
❀ He ends up getting stuck with you ❀

Nsfw| It was a simple mission, but you two end up stuck together, and he doesn’t even like you.

Tags: (kinda?) enemies to lovers, forced proximity, etc.

I know this is vague and lacking in details, but I didn't know how to describe everything.

And I promise to continue with my requests as soon as possible. I've just been distracted by this movie, sorryyy! ♡
